mapper.select: SELECT id, userId, userName, userHead FROM user where (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} is null or id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}) and (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} is null or userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (userId, userName, userHead, createTime, updateTime) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userHead,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW())
